signals.reasoning: Cover the live MON short immediately. The position is severely underwater, liquidation distance is tightening, and there is no remaining downside edge strong enough to justify holding a trade this broken.
BTC is constructive but still not offering a strong enough imbalance to outrank better post-exit opportunities.
ETH is mixed and the board is too weak to justify fresh risk while the macro backdrop remains red.
SOL has a decent bullish setup with negative funding support and improving mechanics, making it a viable secondary long after the MON risk is removed.
CHILLGUY has strong momentum, but the move is crowded and the execution quality is too poor to trust as a fresh entry.
GRASS is still mostly a momentum-by-observation name rather than a clean setup with enough liquidity quality to act on.
TNSR remains a valid squeeze-style long because funding is still negative and the board stays constructive, though the edge is weaker than ZEC here.
TAO remains the cleanest short on the rest of the board because price is still in a clear downside trend and funding has flipped back positive.
ZEREBRO has momentum but not enough trade quality to earn more than watch-only status.
DASH has constructive momentum but the setup is already extended and no longer offers clean entry geometry.
ZEC is the best fresh long after flattening MON because it combines strong bullish mechanics, negative funding, and much better liquidity quality than the smaller beta names.
